features.name: Implement is_ready tool — GET /health, returns {ready, port, timestamp}
Implement post_reply tool — delegates to port 3007 POST /api/reply with dryRun support
Implement search tool — GET /api/search with query/limit params
Implement timeline tool — GET /api/timeline with username param
Implement compose tool — POST /api/tweet with dryRun support
Implement like tool — POST /api/like/:tweetId with dryRun support
Implement retweet tool — POST /api/retweet/:tweetId with dryRun support
Structured error handling: RATE_LIMITED, SESSION_EXPIRED, SERVICE_DOWN codes
Register server on stdio transport + export for MCP client consumption
